attributes.action: Make it mandatory for all MPs to complete an enhanced DBS check
attributes.additional_details: Members of Parliament occupy positions of exceptional trust, power, and access. They make laws that govern the lives of others, routinely interact with vulnerable individuals, and enjoy privileged access to schools, charities, care settings, and constituent casework involving children and adults at risk.
attributes.background:
I want the government to debate this issue and hopefully bring all MPs into line with other persons that are subject to having to complete DBS in order to carry out their work. 
I feel it is unsatisfactory that they should be excluded in this day and age.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition which calls for a similar action: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756785
